titleStmt.title: SII 34.397: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 397. Kōvilānguḷam, Aruppukkottai Taluk, Ramanathapuram District. On the west and south bases of the Ambalappasvāmi temple.

summary.p: Some portion at the end containing signatories is worn out. This is in verse and records that a golden vimāna with a maṇḍapam was constructed in Kumbaṉūr in Cheṅgāṭṭirukkai of Veṇbu-vaḷanāḍu to consecrate the image of Mukkuḍaiyōr (Tīrttaṅkara). Two copper images of the god and the Yakshi were also presented. Land for a temple site and watershed was also given. It is the ūrār of Kumbanūr who did all these things. The names of the members of the ūrār are given in lines 8 to 13. Several of them have some patronizing attributes, reflecting their learing and knowledge in Tamil. The attribute ‘māmattaraṉ’ found as part of some names is interesting.

[Published in Virudhunagar District Inscriptions, No. 141—42/2005]The text in this volume has several variant readings, perhaps due to bad state of preservation of the inscription at present. Moreover it is treated as two separate inscriptions.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tripuvana cakkaravartikaḷ śrīkulOttuṅkacOḻa tEvaṟku yāṇṭu nāṟpatteṭṭāvatil Ilaṅku veṇpu vaḷanāṭṭu nīṇṭa ceṅkāṭṭirukkai taṉnil niṟainta pukaṭk kumpanūril Oru moḻiiṉāl liruviṉai kaṭantOṅkiya
mukkuṭaiyōṟkku tirumaṇṭapattoṭu cempoṟ divya vimāṉam ceytu tirukkōyili lataṟkkēṟpa cilaippaṭimam ceytamaittu karukkōliya Ulōkattiṉālk kaṭavuḷ mēniyum yakṣimēniyum Avaiyiraṇṭum muḷavākki Ayintrakamanam Aṇipeṟutti Avūri
ṟ kīḻainattamum Ataṟkku mēṟku paḻamatiḷaṭi Evvatikku ṉāṉkiṉukkum Ellai puṟamatiḷāka naṉnakariṟ kaṟppāṟaiyil Aṟikuṟi Irupattu nāṟcāṇ coṉṉa kōl nilaṉorumāvum tūyakaṟppaṭaic cuṭark kiṇaṟum peṟum vilaikku koṇṭu
koṇṭaṟp pēṟuṇi nīr tappumākilum tappāta naṟuntaṇṇīrt taṭam pan=tal ciṉamatattaṟkku vaippān nivaḻtam Avvūr vaṭavaḻi Iraṇṭāñ caturattu Aṇikaruñ ceyirupattoṉṟāñ ceṟuvil vaṭakūṟṟil Aṇikiḷar nila mūṉṟumāvō ṭaraikkāṇiyum
maṟṟataṉuṭaṉ Eṇṇu mūṉṟāñ catirat tirupattoṟṟāñ cey nilam kaṇṇiy Āṟumāttuṭainta kāṇiyum nilam kāṇiyākki viccataram Oṉṟaraiyiṉāl yikkōlāl vanta naṉṉilam takka Oṉpatu mākkāṇi Araikkāṇiyuñ cāṟṟu Aṉ nilattuḷp paṭṭana piṟavum El
lām Urittāka vilaiporuḷ kuṭuttappūmip poruḷ koṇṭu poliyūṭṭum peṟakkuṭuttapiṉ Antarāyam taṉkaṭamai cantirātittaruḷḷavum van=taṉavelām Ūravarē vaḻi vaḻi niṉṟiṟuppatākavum Akkiṇaṟu pōtāviṭil Ayal kiṇaṟṟil taṇṇīrum yippanta
lukkurittākavum yitaṟ kiṭaiyūṟiyaṟṟinārkaḷ māpātakar Āyivvūrilum Oruvarāka varucapatam Ōvāmal nilai niṟuttutal Ūravartañ ceyalākki kariya kallilum ceyya cempilum kāṭccipeṟap poṟippatākavum terivariyapaṭi niṟutti teritta
ppoḻutūrākiya Avanicēkaraṉṉuṭaiyāṉum paruttikkuṭi nāṭṭatipaṉum puvanipukaḻ māmattaraṉ cāttaṉu mēppukaḻccāttaṉ peṟṟāṉum tuccāttaṉ peruñcāḷāma liruñcōṇāṭṭu kaṟṟavar makiḻ tamiḻvēḷum karututēvaṉ tirucātta
ṉum tikaḻtēvaṉ Irāmaṉum Avanicēkaraṉ neṭuñcāttaṉṉāna tikaḻ cēṉāvaraiyaṉum Avanicēkaraṉ cōḻaneṉum yivviruvaru mariya kalai Aruntamiḷṇūl tericōḻaṉ periyāṉum paṭipukaḻ pulavaṉ cāttaṉum paruvukuṭitāṅ
ki nārāyaṇaṉ muṭivil kīttipuṉai Aṇuttira mūvēnta vēḷāṉum Entamāṇikkaṉ caturnāma rājatuṅka mūvēnta vēḷāṉum Entarāpuṉaimāṇikka viṟalviṭai Amarttikaṇṭaṉu māmattara māṇikkanu māmattaraṉ Appaṉum malartāmatta rāṇi piṭāraṉ
cōṇāṭaṉ Eṉa tanaḻaittaviral vīranārāyaṇa mūvēnta vēḷāṉun tirupiṭāraṉ kuṇavāṉun tamiṭ cāttaṉṉuṭaiyāṉu vaḷḷal māṇikkaṉ pukaḻaṉuñ collunāyakaṉ villaṉum Ātittaṉ Ayyaṉum Aḻakaṇipāttaṉ vēḷāṉum muḻutuṇar pāṇṭiyakulapati
mūvēnta vēḷāṉum pāttaṉ Avani cēkaraṉum Aṭaikkiḷāṉ pūvaṇavaṉum cīrttakuṇaveṇṭikaṟppakaṉ cempiyaṉ veṇpuḷanāṭu kiḻavaṉuṅ kuṇaveṇṭi cēntapirāṉuṅ kuṇaveṇṭi māmattaraṉāṅ kaṉṉavilu maṇipuyattu teṉṉavaṉ mūvēnta vēḷum māṉā
paraṇaṉ kuṇaveṇṭiyum tīppeṟṟāṉ yuyakkoṇṭāṉuñ cāṇāṭṭu vēḷān tamiḷppeṟṟāṉ tericōḻaṉuṅ kuṇaveṇṭi karumēniyuṅ koṭaiccuntaṉ peṟṟāṉum kīḻūr peṟṟāṉ māṇikkaṉu māmattaraṉ peṟṟāṉum varuciṟiyāṉ kōvaṉum Ūṟkkaṇak
Digital edition of SII 34.397 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
